query: TITLE-ABS-KEY(("cool roof*" OR "green roof*" OR "living roof*" OR "reflective roof*" OR "white roof*" OR "vegetated roof*" OR "roof intervention*" OR "rooftop intervention*" OR "building retrofit*" OR "green infrastructure" OR "sustainable roof*" OR "eco-roof*") AND ("urban heat island*" OR "temperature reduction" OR "thermal comfort" OR "heat exposure" OR "ambient temperature" OR microclimate* OR "heat stress" OR "heat-related illness*" OR "cooling effect*" OR "surface temperature*") AND (("health outcome*" OR mortality OR morbidity OR "cardiovascular disease*" OR "respiratory disease*" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "excess mortality") AND ("randomized controlled trial*" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "natural experiment*" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "instrumental variable*" OR "regression discontinuity" OR "propensity score*" OR "causal inference" OR "intervention study" OR "policy evaluation" OR RCT OR trial* OR evaluat* OR "before-after" OR "pre-post" OR "impact assessment")))
